title: Common Roads
description: This mod lets you make roads and drive on them.
body:
=====About mod=====

The mod will add "Asphalt" to your world and you can craft it.

There are other blocks that you can put on top of it such as "Yellow line" where it is ment to be in the middle of the asphalt to seprate the sides of the roads.
White line to tell others that is the edge of the roads.
Crosswalks. For the ones who want to cross the roads safely!

Features added

entities being riden on get a 3 times boost
players who have boots get a 1 times boost

speed bumps slow the player/riden entities

custom 3D moddels

new: liquid asphalt for continuous filling of roads for easy making of roads
